user.title: EcoFlow Developer Credentials
user.description: Enter your Access Key and Secret Key from the [EcoFlow Developer Portal]({developer_portal_url}).

devices.title: Select Devices
devices.description: Select the EcoFlow devices you want to add to Home Assistant.

mode.title: Connection Mode
mode.description:
**Standard Mode** uses the official EcoFlow IoT API with updates every 10-30 seconds.

**Enhanced Mode** uses a real-time WebSocket connection with updates every ~3 seconds. This is an unofficial connection method and requires your EcoFlow account email and password.

enhanced.title: Enhanced Mode Credentials
enhanced.description:
**Disclaimer:** Enhanced Mode uses an unofficial connection to EcoFlow servers. It is not supported by EcoFlow and may stop working at any time. Use at your own risk.

Enter your EcoFlow app email and password. The User ID will be obtained automatically via login.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to EcoFlow API. Check your credentials.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Access Key or Secret Key.
error.no_devices: No devices found. Make sure devices are bound in the EcoFlow app.
error.enhanced_login_failed: Enhanced Mode login failed. Check your EcoFlow app email and password.

abort.already_configured: This EcoFlow account is already configured.

init.title: EcoFlow Energy Options
init.description:
Adjust connection mode and device settings.

**Enhanced Mode** provides real-time updates (~3 s) for **PowerOcean only**. Other devices (Delta, Smart Plug) always use Standard Mode automatically.

enhanced.title: Enhanced Mode Credentials
enhanced.description: Enter your EcoFlow app email and password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to EcoFlow API.
error.no_devices: Please select at least one device.
